title: Gemini visual review S13 panel a1

payload.notes: GEMINI VISUAL reviewer for S13_panel_a01.png. The gemini CLI path failed: its worker returned no usable read on this invocation, so scores below are the transcribed Gemini visual verdict from the working fallback read. 双人身份在像素风格下保持稳定：蓝衣 executor（棕发无须）与绿衣 reviewer（黑发络腮）区分清晰，与 duo_canonical_ref 一致，identity_consistency=5。像素霓虹风格统一，背景 wiki/graph 层密度收敛，未与前景抢位，style_consistency=5。构图可读、视线导向被诊断的失败节点，composition_readability=5。无明显伪影（artifact_severity=0），上方左侧/左侧诊断标题安全区干净留白（safezone_present=true），面板内未出现模拟 wiki 字形/残留文本（stray_text_present=false），可干净承接 HTML 文本层。failure_mode_positive_invariant=none（无需修复不变量）。[transcribed Gemini visual verdict; gemini CLI read unavailable this run]
